description: For external financial reporting, a public company needs to prepare segment information, breaking down its revenue and profit by business segment.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve revenue and cost of goods sold data broken down by business segment from the general ledger.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the financial data for each defined segment.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the gross profit for each business segment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly calculates the gross profit per segment.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report in the format required for the footnote disclosure in the 10-K report.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a formatted table showing revenue and profit by reportable segment.
